chapter_title.en: The Method of Ghusl for Janabah (ritual Bath for Sexual impurity)

text: حَدِيثٍ آخَرَ: «إِنْ كَانَ قَدْ رَأَى بَلَلاً وَ لَمْ يَكُنْ بَالَ فَلْيَتَوَضَّأْ وَ لاَ يَغْتَسِلْ إِنَّمَا ذَلِكَ مِنَ اَلْحَبَائِلِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.188 - It is narrated in another report (Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) ) said :
'If he sees wetness and has not urinated, he should perform wudu (ablution) and not ghusl, as this is due to residual moisture (habāʾil).'
